title: New species of Tropicoporus from India and key to Afro-Asian species
author: Gunaseelan, Sugantha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 3 Tropicoporus cleistanthicola (MUBL1089 holotype) A basidiomata (Holotype) B pore surface C cross-section of basidiome (arrows indicating stratified tube layers) D hymenial setae E–H basidiospores: E basidiospores in water F basidiospores in KOHG basidiospore in cotton blue H basidiospore in Melzer's reagent. Scale bars: 1 cm (A–C); 5 µm (D–H).
